text:
Maternal Child Adolescent Health | Kern County, CA
Maternal, Child and Adolescent Health (MCAH) programs help keep babies, kids, teens, and families healthy.
We support:
Pregnant people and families
Infants and young children
Teens and young adults
Our team connects families to community services, helps them navigate care, and shares helpful information about things like nutrition, pregnancy, baby safety, and child wellness.
Referrals to MCAH Programs
Healthcare providers can submit a referral using our referral form:
Here
